summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Next.js 14 GoToLinks application. All specified requirements verified successfully - homepage, signup/login pages, features section (6 cards), pricing section (Free/Pro plans), navigation links, and mobile responsiveness all working correctly.

expected_issues.impact: Form submission fails but error handling works correctly
expected_issues.fix_priority: EXPECTED - Supabase database not configured with real credentials
expected_issues.note: This is expected behavior as mentioned in review request

expected_issues.impact: Form submission fails but error handling works correctly
expected_issues.fix_priority: EXPECTED - Supabase database not configured with real credentials
expected_issues.note: This is expected behavior as mentioned in review request

passed_tests: Homepage loads correctly with navigation and hero section
Features section displays exactly 6 feature cards as expected
Pricing section shows Free ($0) and Pro ($19/month) plans correctly
Navigation links work properly (Features, Pricing scroll navigation)
Signup page loads with all form fields (firstName, lastName, email, password) and Google OAuth button
Login page loads with form fields (email, password) and Google OAuth button
Mobile responsive design works correctly - navigation adapts, layouts stack properly
Form validation working (HTML5 required field validation)
Password visibility toggles functional on both login and signup forms
Navigation between login/signup pages works correctly
All CTA buttons navigate to correct destinations
Custom CSS classes and Tailwind CSS applied correctly
Custom fonts (Inter, Playfair Display) loading properly
Google OAuth buttons properly configured with redirect URLs
No console errors or JavaScript issues detected
action_item_for_main_agent: No action items - frontend implementation is complete and excellent. The only 'issues' are expected backend API failures due to placeholder Supabase credentials, which were noted in the original review request.
